meaning: adj.叶状的,多叶的,阔叶的,树叶茂盛的
examples: His two-storey brick home was surrounded by tall, leafy trees.
Surprisingly, she saw her long-lost wedding ring beneath the leafy top of one tiny carrot.
His semi-detached house still stands in leafy Menlove Avenue with a blue plaque advertising its famous former occupant.
The rooftop views and the leafy cloister with its gaggle of geese should not be missed.
